indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX schema_migrations_pkey ON realtime.schema_migrations USING btree (version)

indexes.name: ix_realtime_subscription_entity
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX ix_realtime_subscription_entity ON realtime.subscription USING btree (entity)

indexes.name: pk_subscription
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX pk_subscription ON realtime.subscription USING btree (id)

indexes.name: subscription_subscription_id_entity_filters_action_filter_key
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX subscription_subscription_id_entity_filters_action_filter_key ON realtime.subscription USING btree (subscription_id, entity, filters, action_filter)

indexes.name: bname
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX bname ON storage.buckets USING btree (name)

indexes.name: buckets_pkey
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX buckets_pkey ON storage.buckets USING btree (id)

indexes.name: buckets_analytics_pkey
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX buckets_analytics_pkey ON storage.buckets_analytics USING btree (id)

indexes.name: buckets_analytics_unique_name_idx
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX buckets_analytics_unique_name_idx ON storage.buckets_analytics USING btree (name) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)

indexes.name: buckets_vectors_pkey
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX buckets_vectors_pkey ON storage.buckets_vectors USING btree (id)

indexes.name: migrations_name_key
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX migrations_name_key ON storage.migrations USING btree (name)

indexes.name: migrations_pkey
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX migrations_pkey ON storage.migrations USING btree (id)

indexes.name: bucketid_objname
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX bucketid_objname ON storage.objects USING btree (bucket_id, name)

indexes.name: idx_objects_bucket_id_name
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_objects_bucket_id_name ON storage.objects USING btree (bucket_id, name COLLATE "C")

indexes.name: idx_objects_bucket_id_name_lower
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_objects_bucket_id_name_lower ON storage.objects USING btree (bucket_id, lower(name) COLLATE "C")

indexes.name: name_prefix_search
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX name_prefix_search ON storage.objects USING btree (name text_pattern_ops)

indexes.name: objects_pkey
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX objects_pkey ON storage.objects USING btree (id)

indexes.name: idx_multipart_uploads_list
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_multipart_uploads_list ON storage.s3_multipart_uploads USING btree (bucket_id, key, created_at)

indexes.name: s3_multipart_uploads_pkey
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX s3_multipart_uploads_pkey ON storage.s3_multipart_uploads USING btree (id)

indexes.name: s3_multipart_uploads_parts_pkey
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX s3_multipart_uploads_parts_pkey ON storage.s3_multipart_uploads_parts USING btree (id)

constraints.name: s3_multipart_uploads_parts_upload_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (upload_id) REFERENCES storage.s3_multipart_uploads(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

indexes.name: vector_indexes_name_bucket_id_idx
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX vector_indexes_name_bucket_id_idx ON storage.vector_indexes USING btree (name, bucket_id)

indexes.name: vector_indexes_pkey
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX vector_indexes_pkey ON storage.vector_indexes USING btree (id)

indexes.name: secrets_name_idx
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX secrets_name_idx ON vault.secrets USING btree (name) WHERE (name IS NOT NULL)

indexes.name: secrets_pkey
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX secrets_pkey ON vault.secrets USING btree (id)
